zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux於大約0992年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾易福-拉-巴塔爾時，她的父親Raoul comte d'Ivry52歲，母親Eremburge Caux Bayeux10歲。她於大約1009年與Osbern the Steward de Crépon在法國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1034年在法國諾門迪享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux于大约0992年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾易福-拉-巴塔爾时，她的父亲Raoul comte d'Ivry52岁，母亲Eremburge Caux Bayeux10岁。她于大约1009年与Osbern the Steward de Crépon在法国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1034年在法国諾門迪享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: et
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Erik, Knut.
Swedish: topographic or ornamental name from ek ‘oak’.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farms named Eik, from eik ‘oak’.

variants.name: Eck
meanings: German, Dutch, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name from Middle High German ecke, egge ‘corner’, German Eck(e) (Yiddish ek). This could have been the corner of two streets or, in the case of the German name, the corner of a field or area of land or a rocky outcrop.

German: from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names with the first element agi(n), agil ‘point, edge (of a sword)’, akin to the word in 1 above. This surname (in both senses; see 1 above) is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).
Swedish and Norwegian: variant of   Ek  .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bayeux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Landry, Alphonse, Andre, Armand, Colette, Monique, Theophile.
French (northern): from an old form of   Mayeur  . Compare   Mayeaux  .

variants.name: Mayeaux
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Clemile, Ferrel.

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux was born about 0992, in Ivry-la-Bataille, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Raoul comte d'Ivry, was 52 and her mother, Eremburge Caux Bayeux, was 10. She married Osbern the Steward de Crépon about 1009, in France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1034, in Normandy, France, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux est née environ 0992, à Ivry-la-Bataille, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Raoul comte d'Ivry, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Eremburge Caux Bayeux, avait 10 ans. Elle a épousé Osbern the Steward de Crépon environ 1009, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1034, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux um 0992 in Ivry-la-Bataille, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul comte d'Ivry 52 und ihre Mutter Eremburge Caux Bayeux 10. Sie hat um 1009 in Frankreich Osbern the Steward de Crépon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1034 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux è nata il circa 0992 nel Ivry-la-Bataille, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Raoul comte d'Ivry, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Eremburge Caux Bayeux, aveva 10 anni. Lei sposato Osbern the Steward de Crépon circa 1009, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1034, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeuxが約0992年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアイvリ-ラ-バティイルで生まれた時，父Raoul comte d'Ivryは52歳，母Eremburge Caux Bayeuxは10歳であった。約1009年にフランスでOsbern the Steward de Créponと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1034年にフランスノーマンディで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux(이)가 대략 0992년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 이브리-라-바테이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul comte d'Ivry(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eremburge Caux Bayeux(은)는 10세였다. 그녀는 대략 1009년 프랑스에서 Osbern the Steward de Crépon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1034년 프랑스 노먼디에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux nasceu aproximadamente 0992, em Ivry-la-Bataille, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Raoul comte d'Ivry, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Eremburge Caux Bayeux, tinha 10 anos. Ela casou-se com Osbern the Steward de Crépon aproximadamente 1009, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1034, em Normandie, França, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux родилась около 0992 г. в местности иври-ла-батеилл, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Raoul comte d'Ivry было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Eremburge Caux Bayeux, 10. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Osbern the Steward de Crépon около 1009 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1034 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux nació aproximadamente 0992, en Ivry-la-Bataille, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Raoul comte d'Ivry, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Eremburge Caux Bayeux, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Osbern the Steward de Crépon aproximadamente 1009, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1034, en Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 43 años.
